overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic action-adventure game showing a warrior with braided hair walking through a Nordic landscape at sunset. The character follows a companion through open grasslands, rocky terrain, and across wooden walkways spanning a geothermal area with steaming vents.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with distant mountains and stone ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through grassland following a companion toward distant mountains

notable_agents.action: male companion walking ahead on the dirt path toward the mountains

entered.detail: large mountain range silhouetted against the sunset sky in the background
dry brown grass covering the ground in the open field
low stone wall ruins running parallel to the path on the left side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassland at sunset, with the camera following a female warrior from behind as she walks toward distant mountains. A male companion walks ahead in the distance. The terrain is flat with dry grass and scattered stone ruins on the left, while the golden sun casts long shadows across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach to geothermal area with wooden posts

events.description: entering rocky terrain with scattered boulders and wooden fence posts

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky outcrops and wooden posts while approaching the geothermal area

notable_agents.action: companion continuing to walk ahead through the rocky terrain

entered.detail: scattered large boulders and rocky outcrops surrounding the path
tall wooden posts marking the boundary of the path
rising steam visible in the distance indicating geothermal activity

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from open grassland to a rocky area with large boulders and wooden fence posts lining the path. The ground becomes gravelly as the character approaches a geothermal area with visible steam rising in the distance. The companion continues walking ahead as the terrain becomes more rugged.

scene_state.functional_zone: geothermal area with wooden walkways over steaming vents

events.description: stepping onto wooden walkway suspended over geothermal steam vents
companion stops and waits on the right side of the wooden path

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along wooden walkways over steaming geothermal pools, following the companion who stops ahead to wait

notable_agents.action: companion standing still on the right side of the walkway, waiting for the player character

entered.detail: rustic wooden plank walkway suspended over the geothermal chasm
active steam vents rising from the geothermal pools below the walkway
deep rocky chasm filled with steaming geothermal water and mist
small rustic wooden hut structure visible on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character steps onto wooden walkways suspended over a geothermal chasm with steam rising from below. The path winds through the misty, rocky terrain with a wooden hut visible on the left. The companion stops ahead on the right side of the walkway to wait, while the camera continues forward along the planks, revealing more of the steaming geothermal landscape and distant mountains.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wide Nordic grassland that gradually transforms into a rugged, steaming geothermal landscape. It begins by trailing a female warrior across flat, dry grass and scattered stone ruins under a golden sunset, with a male companion walking ahead toward distant mountains. As the terrain shifts, the open fields give way to a gravelly path lined with large boulders and wooden fence posts, leading the camera toward rising plumes of steam. The scene then transitions onto suspended wooden walkways that wind over a geothermal chasm, passing a small wooden hut amidst the mist. Finally, the camera moves past the waiting companion along the planks to reveal the full expanse of the steaming vents and the towering mountains beyond.
